title: Adani Power Reschedules Q4FY26 Earnings Conference Call to April 30, 2026 - scanx.trade
content:
Adani Power Reschedules Q4FY26 Earnings Conference Call to April 30, 2026
Adani Power Limited officially rescheduled its Q4FY26 earnings conference call from April 29, 2026 at 5:00 PM to April 30, 2026 at 11:00 AM IST. The company filed this update with BSE and NSE on April 25, 2026, with senior management including CEO Mr. Shersingh B Khyalia, CFO Mr. Dilip Jha, and Head of Investor Relations Mr. Nishit Dave set to participate. ICICI Securities continues coordinating the call with comprehensive dial-in access for analysts and investors.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Adani Power Limited has officially rescheduled its quarterly earnings conference call for Q4FY26 from April 29 to April 30, 2026 at 11:00 AM India Standard Time. The company announced this change through an official filing with BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited on April 25, 2026, referencing their earlier intimations dated April 7 and April 22, 2026.
Official Filing and Rescheduling Details
The company submitted the updated earnings call details to both stock exchanges under Regulation 30. The filing was signed by Puneet Bansal, Company Secretary, and provides comprehensive access information for research analysts and institutional investors.
Management Participation
The earnings call will feature key members of Adani Power's senior management team to discuss the company's Q4FY26 financial performance and business developments:
Conference Call Access Information
ICICI Securities continues to coordinate the earnings conference call, providing multiple access options for research analysts and institutional investors. Participants can join through universal access numbers or international toll-free options.

ICICI Securities Coordination Team
ICICI Securities has designated a comprehensive coordination team to facilitate the rescheduled earnings call:
The rescheduled conference call represents the company's standard quarterly practice where management discusses financial results, operational performance, and addresses questions from the investment community. This earnings call will provide insights into Adani Power's performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026.
